description: Address review feedback: Add catch on PublishSuccessNotification, fix asymmetric SNS message schema for failure notification, and add a test verifying state ordering/catch wiring.
steps: Step 1 - Add a Catch on PublishSuccessNotification routing to updateStatusFailed on error.
Step 2 - Change the failure notification SNS message to use $.error.Cause instead of $.error for consistent flat schema.
Step 3 - Add a test verifying state machine definition has correct state wiring (Next fields and catch targets).
acceptance_criteria: publishSuccess.AddCatch routes to updateStatusFailed with States.ALL and ResultPath $.error
publishFailure uses JsonPath.StringAt("$.error.Cause") instead of JsonPath.StringAt("$.error") for the error field
A new test verifies state ordering: UpdateStatusCompleted -> PublishSuccessNotification, UpdateStatusFailed -> PublishFailureNotification, and catch routing to UpdateStatusFailed
verification: export PATH="/root/.dotnet:$PATH" && unset NODE_OPTIONS && cd /projects/sandbox/cdk-sleep-csharp-kiro && dotnet test src/CdkBase.sln --verbosity normal
export PATH="/root/.dotnet:$PATH" && unset NODE_OPTIONS && cd /projects/sandbox/cdk-sleep-csharp-kiro && npx cdk synth
